events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess hazard: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it, active work. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires protective systems for trenches 5 ft or deeper (unless excavation in stable rock). Workers in unprotected trench is high/critical hazard, cave-in. Decision fail. Risk critical. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant (and maybe installed-defective? trench protection absent, not installed defective; non-compliant). Findings: workers in trench 5 ft or deeper without protective system; no sloping/shoring/shielding; potential cave-in. Actions: immediately evacuate workers; install protective system (sloping, benching, shoring, trench shield) per competent person and engineer; barricade; assess soil; competent person inspection; no re-entry until protected. References: OSHA 1926.650-.652, 1926.652 requirements for protective systems. Need include fields: percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source empty? event_time 0. rate 0. order empty list. workable empty list. confidence 1.0. Ensure valid JSON.

  "findings": [
    "Workers are inside a trench 5 ft or deeper with no protective system in place.",
    "Exposure to cave-in hazard; soil collapse can bury or crush workers.",
    "Condition violates OSHA 1926 Subpart P protective system requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately evacuate all workers from the trench.",
    "Prohibit re-entry until an adequate protective system is installed.",
    "Install sloping, benching, shoring, or a trench shield designed for the actual soil conditions and depth.",
    "Have a competent person classify the soil and inspect the excavation.",
    "Erect barricades, warning lines, and access controls around the trench.",
    "Review the excavation permit and emergency rescue plan before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires a protective system for any trench 5 feet deep or greater unless the excavation is entirely in stable rock. Workers actively working in an unprotected trench of this depth face an imminent danger of cave-in, making the condition critical and non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P",
    "29 CFR 1926.650",
    "29 CFR 1926.651",
    "29 CFR 1926.652"
  ]
}
